topics.title: Deep Tech
topics.executive_summary: Researchers developed a room-temperature quantum device using twisted light to entangle photons and electrons, overcoming a major hurdle in practical quantum technology implementation.

stories.headline: Twisted Light Entangles Photons and Electrons at Room Temperature
stories.body: A breakthrough quantum device operates at room temperature using twisted light to entangle photons and electrons, solving one of quantum technology's biggest practical challenges. The discovery could accelerate real-world quantum applications.
